title: [verifier] Deliver full `.idea` PR-repair intent end-to-end
objective: Final capstone: prove the full `.handoff/.idea` intended outcome exists as a working agentic PR-failure repair control loop: durable queue/state, meta-native scan/classify/lane/assign/watch/merge surface, live-session routing, platform lanes, verifier gatekeeper, runner/GitHub App integration, durable learning, and multiple real PR repair outcomes.
acceptance_criteria: All prerequisite TASK-PRR-0001 through TASK-PRR-0016 are done or superseded by stronger implemented evidence.
A single documented command surface or prototype can scan open PRs, classify failures, create/update lanes, assign/nudge workers, watch CI, and merge/automerge green PRs with JSON evidence.
At least one shared incident and at least 2-3 individual PR repair flows have reached merged/automerge/superseded/blocked-with-evidence states.
Verifier gate prevents red required-check merges, out-of-scope diffs, stale/superseded PRs, and multi-owner lane conflicts.
Agent-surface parity is checked or generated for Claude/Codex with CLI fallback, and canonical plugin source identity is resolved.
Failure signatures are retrievable from ICM and projected into `.handoff/pr-repair/lessons` where useful.
Final `.handoff/packets/latest.md` explains the implemented system, open limitations, exact commands, and proof artifacts.
test_commands: rtk meta pr-repair scan --json || scripts/pr-repair scan --json
gh pr list --owner FlexNetOS --state open --json repository,number,title

source_gap_audit.reason: Expanded from .handoff/.idea intent after the initial TASK-PRR set proved too broad.
